extension.description: EasyMovie helps you pick movies for movie night. Answer a few questions (genre, rating, runtime) and get a curated random selection from your library. Supports movie set awareness, multiple viewing modes, and playlist generation.
extension.news: v1.1.0 (2026-06-05) - Resume dialog now shows movie details: year, rating, runtime, genre, and plot - Context menu adjusts its size when "Play Full Set" is not available - Resume dialog added to the dialog preview for theme testing - Improved visual consistency across all dialogs
